description: IIW Type 1 (V1) calibration block, side profile: 100mm radius quadrant w/ slot at focal point, acrylic insert disc + 35-70 degree fan, 1.5mm SDH, angle-beam probe coupled over the zero line. Four-step angle-beam standardization reveals: exit point ray, refracted-angle ray through insert, range echo wavefronts, SDH sensitivity w/ 80% FSH bar.
